properties.description: Pipeline que implementa la ejecución de la lógica del arquetipo

expression.value:
@and(
    and(
        or(
            or(
                equals(item().type, 'NOTEBOOK'), 
                equals(item().type, 'SIMPLE')),
            equals(item().type, 'DELTA')),
        pipeline().parameters.testing),
    variables('continue'))

value.value:
@if( equals(string(coalesce(item()?.condition, 'notFound')), 'notFound'), 
     concat('No condition in the task:', coalesce(item()?.name, 'no_name')),
     concat('executionOutputs: ', pipeline().parameters.previousOutputs, ', condition found: name:',
       coalesce(item()?.condition?.name, 'name_notFound'),
       ', internal_name:',
       coalesce(item()?.condition?.internal_name, item().condition.name),
       ', key:',
       coalesce(item()?.condition?.key, 'keyNotFound'),
       ', value:',
       coalesce(item()?.condition?.value, 'valueNotFound')
     )
)

expression.value:
@and(
    and(
        or(
            or(
                equals(item().type, 'NOTEBOOK'), 
                equals(item().type, 'SIMPLE')),
            equals(item().type, 'DELTA')),
        pipeline().parameters.testing),
    not(equals(coalesce(item()?.test?.targets_init, '[]'), '[]')))
